examples.title: Algorithm: Play Audio
examples.description: A step-by-step guide to playing audio in Android
examples.code:
ALGORITHM PlayAudio
INPUT: audioFile
OUTPUT: None

BEGIN
 1. Initialize MediaPlayer object
 2. Set data source to audioFile
 3. Prepare MediaPlayer
 4. Start playing audio
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic steps to play an audio file in Android using the MediaPlayer class.

examples.title: Java: Play Audio
examples.description: A Java implementation of playing audio in Android
examples.explanation: This Java code demonstrates how to play an audio file in Android using the MediaPlayer class.

examples.title: Java: Text to Speech
examples.description: A Java implementation of text to speech in Android
